mapper.sql: id, fund_code, rank_no, stock_name, stock_code, market, holding_ratio, quarter_change_type, quarter_change_value, create_time, update_time
mapper.update: UPDATE fund_top_holding SET stock_name = #{stockName}, stock_code = #{stockCode}, market = #{market}, holding_ratio = #{holdingRatio}, quarter_change_type = #{quarterChangeType}, quarter_change_value = #{quarterChangeValue}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM fund_top_holding WHERE stock_code = #{stockCode} ORDER BY id DESC
